title: EOIR issues guidance on adjustment of status eligibility for certain Liberians under the NDAA
description_html:
Through Policy Memo 20-06, EOIR provides guidance on how the National Defense Authorization Act -- which contains a new eligibility program for adjustment of status for certain Liberian nationals and their immediate family members -- impacts on applicants' removability and other issues that may arise in immigration proceedings.

[ID #232]
